name: Reflex Cat Treats - Meaty Bite Snack, Duck & Cheese 40g
shortDescription: Reflex Cat Treats – Dental Care Pocket Treats, Duck. Perfectly sized cat biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour.
description: Reflex Cat Treats - Meaty Bite Snack, Duck & Cheese. Perfectly sized cat biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives 71,9% (4,1% duck), vegetables, vegetable protein extracts, milk and milk derivatives (1,5% cheese powder), yeast, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 24 Crude Fat (%) - 12 Crude Ash (%) - 6.5 Crude Fiber (%) - 1.5 Moisture (%) - 38 Taurin - 445 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: As a snack in addition to meals. Please serve maximal 5 pieces. Please serve at room temperature. Please store in a cool & dry place. Ensure that drinking water is always available for your cat.
